best_for: Auto and home bundling, competitive online quotes
perks: Seamless auto and home bundling through one policy dashboard
Name Your Price tool shows coverage options within your budget
Strong digital experience with instant online quotes
HomeQuote Explorer allows comparison of multiple home insurers
Discount for buying your policy at least three days before it starts
New home discount for recently built properties
drawbacks: Progressive brokers many home policies through third-party insurers
Bundling discount lower than some competitors
Coverage may be underwritten by a partner insurer, not Progressive directly
